CustomField.label: Value
CustomField.description: Numeric value of this configurable tunable (rules/20 — Custom Metadata for config, no hardcoded values in Apex/Flow/formula; A-003). Populated for every numeric setting record (CutOffHours=4 D-010, WalkInReservePct=25 D-009, DefaultSlotGranularityMins=15 D-008, BookingHorizonDays=14, NoShowThresholdCount=3). Left blank on records whose value is non-numeric/multi-valued (see Value_Text__c). CONTRACT — do not rename: VS_Session__c.VS_Walk_In_Reserve_Count__c's formula (VS-01) references this exact field as $CustomMetadata.VS_Setting__mdt.WalkInReservePct.Value__c.
